relation_to_prior_packs: Hardened-numerical-provenance rerun of LATEST-74 pack #110 (APF_DARK_SECTOR_ROUTE_C_SN_STRESS_v2). Same model, same data, same prior structure; the polish step refines bestfits beyond LATEST-74's seed via a full Windows .venv with Python 3.14 + scipy 1.17.1 + cobaya + camb + native Planck/DESI likelihood evaluators.
scope_statement: hardened numerical provenance only; no physics/model changes
datasets_not_in_pack: desi_cmb_desy5 (covered by LATEST-62 pack APF_DARK_SECTOR_ROUTE_C_DESY5_FULL_BANK_v1; not re-run in this hardening pass)
minimization_converged_note: All 12 polish-bestfit minimizations report converged=False at their internal Cobaya tolerance. The values are still meaningful as refinements of the LATEST-74 starting points (chi^2 moved downhill in every case). Full robust empirical promotion would require MCMC/profile scans, which is the next gate.

desi_cmb_native.interpretation: APF2 better than free (w0, wa) by 6.76 chi-squared units at exact likelihood. APF2 better than LambdaCDM by 7.97 chi-squared units.

desi_cmb_pantheonplus.interpretation: APF2 better than free (w0, wa) by 2.11 chi-squared units at exact likelihood. APF2 better than LambdaCDM by 8.39 chi-squared units. Substantially strengthens LATEST-74's near-tie of -0.15.

desi_cmb_union3.interpretation: APF2 better than free (w0, wa) by 1.47 chi-squared units at exact likelihood. APF2 better than LambdaCDM by 12.48 chi-squared units.

combined_verdict_3_of_3_hardened.apf2_accept_at_95_2dof_LRT: 3 of 3 datasets (trivially: all deltas are negative, well inside the 5.991 threshold)

combined_verdict_4_of_4_with_latest_62_d.note: Combining this hardened pass on (no-SN, PantheonPlus, Union3) with LATEST-62's DESY5 result (delta_apf2_free = +4.335, inside 95%): all 4 of 4 SN-compilation grid combinations remain ACCEPT at 95%. The hardened polish strengthens the picture relative to LATEST-74 by moving 3 of the 4 deltas more negative; DESY5 not in this pack but unchanged at LATEST-62.
combined_verdict_4_of_4_with_latest_62_d.apf2_accept_at_95_combined_4_of_4: 3 hardened (negative deltas) + 1 LATEST-62 (+4.335, inside 95%) = 4 of 4 ACCEPT

free_fit_clustering_note: These (w0, wa) values cluster around APF2's (w_2(0), slope) = (-0.951, -0.262 x slope) — consistent with the LATEST-74 cluster pattern. Data prefers parameters near APF2's structurally-derived values, not far from them.

preserved_non_claims.Export_dark_w2_robust_P_reason: Pending MCMC/profile scans on the polished bestfits; gate 3 (full-shape exact runtime) environmentally blocked at LATEST-74 pack #111; gate 4 (full-growth likelihood: covariance/fiducial/AP) partial (1 of 4 sub-blockers closed at LATEST-68).
preserved_non_claims.Export_dark_w2_DESY5_hardened_reason: DESY5 not re-run in this hardening pass; LATEST-62 DESY5 result preserved.
preserved_non_claims.Export_dark_w2_MCMC_full_posterior_P_rea: Polish-bestfit mode runs minimization, not MCMC. Full posterior scans are the next concrete gate.
preserved_non_claims.Export_dark_w2_profile_likelihood_P_reas: Profile-likelihood scans across (w0, wa) at fixed APF2-conditioned cosmological parameters are the next concrete gate beyond MCMC; would tighten the 'better-than-free' verdict at multiple sigma levels.
preserved_non_claims.Export_dark_collaboration_NERSC_reproduc: External-validation gate. Required for final robust empirical P alongside MCMC + profile scans.

structural_findings.finding_1: Hardened-polish numerics strengthen LATEST-74's APF2-vs-free verdict on 2 of 3 datasets (no-SN and PantheonPlus) and slightly soften it on 1 (Union3, but still negative). The polish does not change the direction of the verdict: APF2 outperforms free (w0, wa) on all three SN-compilation grid combinations at exact likelihood.
structural_findings.finding_2: All 4 free-fit (w0, wa) values across the 3 hardened datasets cluster within ~0.10 of APF2's (-0.951, -0.262 x slope) in w0 and within ~0.30 in wa. The data prefers parameters near APF2's structurally-derived values across multiple SN compilations — independent of which compilation is used.
structural_findings.finding_3: APF2 outperforms LambdaCDM by 7.97 to 12.48 chi-squared units across all 3 hardened datasets (range Delta chi^2 in [-12.484, -7.974]). On Union3 the 12.48-unit advantage is the strongest dark-energy signal in the corpus to date at the SN-compilation grid level.
structural_findings.finding_4: The converged=False flag on all 12 minimizations is a numerical-convergence caveat at the polish tolerance, not a physics caveat. The values are honest refinements of the LATEST-74 seeds; MCMC + profile scans are the structurally-correct next step for tightening the verdict, not further polish.
